description_long: This is a vibrant, stylized theme park set on a coastal island, featuring a variety of colorful buildings, winding pathways, and playful architectural elements. The park includes several themed structures such as a large golden archway, a lighthouse, and a collection of whimsical houses and shops. There are multiple ships docked at wooden piers, suggesting a nautical or pirate motif, and the park is surrounded by rocky cliffs and palm trees. Elevated walkways and bridges connect different sections, while open plazas and gathering areas are visible throughout. The overall design is compact yet detailed, with layered terrain and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The color palette is dominated by pastel tones, giving the park a cheerful and inviting atmosphere.
description: A colorful, island-themed amusement park with ships, piers, whimsical buildings, and rocky cliffs, all connected by winding paths and bridges. The design features a playful, nautical motif with pastel colors and lively details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance area, large golden archway, and several ships docked at the piers, with the central plaza and surrounding buildings clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear of the park is visible, showing the rocky cliffs, elevated structures, and a prominent lighthouse, as well as more ships and palm trees.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rocky cliffside, elevated walkways, and the back of the golden archway, with a clear view of the layered terrain and upper-level buildings.
description_view_3: This view showcases the beach area, additional piers, and a variety of colorful buildings, with the mountains and upper park structures in the background.
